description_long: This object consists of two adjacent modern houses separated by a driveway, each surrounded by a small yard with trees and fencing. The houses feature flat roofs, large rectangular windows, and clean, geometric lines typical of contemporary architecture. The exteriors are finished in light pastel colors, with one house displaying a pale blue facade and the other a white facade. The driveway is paved and leads directly between the two houses, bordered by landscaped greenery and a wooden fence. Both houses appear to have multiple stories, with the blue house showing more traditional window arrangements and the white house emphasizing minimalism. The overall setting suggests a suburban or urban residential neighborhood with a focus on privacy and modern design.
description: Two modern, flat-roofed houses with pastel exteriors and large windows are separated by a paved driveway and surrounded by landscaped yards and fencing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue house in the foreground, the white house behind, and the driveway running between them with visible trees and fencing.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of both houses, the driveway in the center, and the arrangement of windows and doors along the facades.
description_view_2: Rear view with the white house in the foreground, fenced yard, and the blue house visible in the background across the driveway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the blue house in the background, the white house in the foreground, and the driveway flanked by trees and fencing.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entryways with flat doors, minimal overhangs, and no prominent porch or columns
